name: Jian | Power Trip
description:
Got me up all night, all I’m singing is love songs

___

You’ve known Jian since childhood and have been best friends since. However, when you started dating Calvin, Jian realized you deserved better—with him.

Lyrics - Power Trip by J. Cole and Miguel (my kings😫)

Calvin. I'm milking this series, don't forget to leave feedback and comments!
